title: Login page not working
description: User cannot log in with correct credentials.

title: Payment gateway error
description: Payment fails during checkout process.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Unable to upload profile picture.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer did not receive reset password email.

title: Website loading slowly
description: Homepage takes too long to load.

title: Error 404 on product page
description: Product details page shows 404 error.

title: Cart not updating
description: Items are not updating in the shopping cart.

title: Mobile view layout broken
description: UI elements overlap on mobile devices.

title: Search function not returning results
description: Search bar shows no results for valid keywords.

title: Order confirmation email delayed
description: Order confirmation email received after several hours.

title: Account locked unexpectedly
description: Customer account locked without reason.

title: Discount code not applying
description: Promo code shows invalid during checkout.

title: Notification settings not saving
description: Changes in notification preferences are not saved.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launch.

title: Unable to download invoice
description: Invoice download button not working.

title: Login page error
description: User cannot login despite correct credentials, system shows invalid password message and prevents access to dashboard page.

title: Payment gateway issue
description: Customer completed payment successfully but order not confirmed, transaction amount deducted and no confirmation email received yet.

title: Profile update bug
description: User attempts to update profile picture but upload fails repeatedly without error message or any notification displayed.

title: Slow website loading
description: Homepage loads very slowly during peak hours, causing frustration and multiple refresh attempts from users frequently.

title: Forgot password email not sent
description: User requested password reset link but did not receive email after multiple attempts from system.

title: Cart not updating
description: Items added to cart disappear automatically after refreshing page or navigating to another section.

title: Order confirmation delay
description: Customer placed order successfully but confirmation message and email notification delayed significantly causing confusion.

title: Search function not working
description: Search feature returns empty results even when valid product names are entered correctly by users.

title: Mobile layout issue
description: Website layout breaks on smaller screens, overlapping text and images reduce usability significantly.

title: Coupon code invalid
description: Valid promotional coupon code shows invalid error message during checkout process unexpectedly.

title: Dashboard crash
description: Admin dashboard crashes immediately after login, preventing access to reports and management features.

title: Image upload failed
description: Product image upload fails repeatedly with timeout error despite stable internet connection.

title: Notification not showing
description: Users not receiving real time notifications for new messages or order updates.

title: Account suspension error
description: Active customer account marked suspended incorrectly without warning or proper verification process.

title: Checkout button not clickable
description: Checkout button remains disabled even after all required fields completed correctly.
